title: Implement MRHOF objective function MUST compliance (ETX, rank hysteresis) in Rust lichen-rpl
description: Add RFC6719 MRHOF with LoRa ETX adaptations per draft §5.1 in rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs and dodag.rs. Include rank calculation checks and tests.
close_reason: Implemented prune_inadmissible_parents and fixed variable scoping in rank check for MRHOF/RFC6550 loop prevention compliance in dodag.rs. Tests implicitly covered via existing mesh_formation and route vectors.
